revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from category navigation |name=From category navigation |from=a category that is used as a navigational aid to the target category, via a category navigation template such as {{tl|Category series navigation}} or similar |info=**Please ''do not'' remove the tag that generates this text (unless the need to use this category directly has been demonstrated) nor delete this page. **This template should only be used on categories which have also been soft-redirected via {{tl|Category redirect}}. }}<noinclude><!--|main category= do not categorize, per [[Special:Permalink/1197129882#Edit request 19 January 2024]]--> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
